name: Python
description: Primary backend programming language for all new RetailCo services.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Standard relational database for transactional workloads across all domains.

name: Apache Kafka
description: Approved event streaming platform for async_event integration patterns.

name: React
description: Approved frontend framework for web applications.

name: MongoDB
description: Document database. Not approved for use at RetailCo — data governance requires relational or approved NoSQL stores only. Use PostgreSQL or Redis instead.

name: Redis
condition_notes: Approved for caching and session storage only. Must not be used as primary data store. Restricted to Marketing and Retail domains.
description: In-memory data store approved conditionally for caching and ephemeral data in Marketing and Retail domains.

name: Oracle Database
description: Oracle DB was used by legacy systems. Retired — all new development must use PostgreSQL.

name: AWS Lambda
description: Serverless compute approved for event-driven workloads and API integrations.

name: Elasticsearch
condition_notes: Approved for search and analytics use cases only. Not approved as primary operational data store. Restricted to Data and Retail domains.
description: Search and analytics engine, conditionally approved for Data and Retail domains for search and BI workloads.

name: XML/SOAP
description: XML-based SOAP protocol. Not approved for new integrations — use REST/JSON or async_event patterns via Kafka.

name: FastAPI
description: Approved Python web framework for building REST APIs.

name: Docker
description: Container runtime. Approved as the standard deployment packaging tool.

name: Kubernetes
description: Container orchestration platform. Approved for all production workloads.
